text:
tubborn mature but of good character.
The native will have two sons and two daughters.
The native will deal in sweets (Ketu and the Moon in 12th to Saturn
aspected by Jupiter conjunct Mars and Rahu).
The native will have mental troubles as Jupiter is conjunct Rahu. He
may gather extra flesh in his body. As Mars is conjunct Jupiter, the native can
get rid of the trouble by operation.
He will have good times from 28-30. The father will be a rich man (the
Sun conjunct Venus) but the placement of Mars and Rahu in the second to
Venus indicates low type ofbusiness. The native will acquire his father's
property. Between 34-35 and 38 he will amass much wealth. Between 40-45
he will do some good deeds (such as propitiating God, charity etc.)
He will have two sons and three daughters.
His mother will pass away early. He will have health troubles which he
can overcome by Pooja and Dana (Charity and worship of gods). His 43rd
year will be dangerous for his father.
